_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in documenting the execution and results in conducting a cyber operation.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architecture diagrams, API specifications, operational runbooks, data dictionaries, and troubleshooting guides that enable team independence.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.504), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.474).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.448). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. DCWF-only terms [conducting, cyber, documenting, execution, operation, results] vs WIDAI-only terms [api, architecture, data, diagrams, dictionaries, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.901, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.056 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Skill in documenting the execution and results in conducting a cyber operation." and "Skill in writing technical documentation for data systems, including architectur" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.552 > STS 0.448 (gap +0.104). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [skill]. DCWF-only: [conducting, cyber, documenting, execution, operation, results]. WIDAI-only: [api, architecture, data, diagrams, dictionaries, documentation].

signals.detail: STS 0.448 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
